api_contracts.method: {'id': 'I001', 'name': 'ILocalizationService — cross-domain utility', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'LocalizationService is injected as a utility into multiple other domains. It does not own a dedicated API surface — it is a supporting service.', 'consumers': [{'consumer': 'StatusController', 'usage': 'GetLocalizedResource(status.TranslationKey, countryId) — translates SMS delivery status descriptions per country/language'}, {'consumer': 'MessageController', 'usage': "GetLocalizedResource('messages.defaultGroupName', languageId) and GetLocalizedResource('shared.DateTimeFormat', languageId) — localizes default message group name and datetime format"}, {'consumer': 'UserController', 'usage': "GetLocalizedResource('errorMessages.LoginUsernameOrPassword', languageId) — translates login error message; also uses GetLanguageLookup indirectly"}], 'note': 'ILocalizationService is registered as Scoped in Startup.cs (line 515). ILanguageService registered as Scoped (line 512).'}

{'id': 'I002', 'name': 'IStaticCacheManager — in-memory caching', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'LocalizationService and LanguageService both use IStaticCacheManager for aggressive in-memory caching. Language list cached 10 hours. Individual resource lookups cached indefinitely until pattern-cleared.', 'cache_keys': ["'ServiceAlert.language.all' — all Language rows, 10-hour TTL", "'sms.lsr.{languageId}-{UPPER(resourceKey)}' — individual resource lookups, cleared on write"], 'invalidation': "InsertLocaleStringResource, UpdateLocaleStringResource, DeleteLocaleStringResource all call RemoveByPattern('sms.lsr.'). Batch import does NOT invalidate cache."}

{'id': 'I003', 'name': 'Z.Dapper.Plus — bulk merge for import', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Import operation uses Z.Dapper.Plus BulkMerge with entity configuration: Table='dbo.LocaleStringResources', Key=(LanguageId, ResourceName). This matches the unique index.", 'source': 'LocalizationService.ImportLocaleStringResourcesAsync: DapperPlusManager.Entity<LocaleStringResource>().Table(...).Key(x => new { x.LanguageId, x.ResourceName })'}

{'id': 'I004', 'name': 'Countries table — runtime not queried', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'The Countries table exists in SSDT schema and is referenced conceptually by CountryConstants, but is NOT queried at runtime. All country-to-culture, country-to-phone-code, and country-to-language mappings are hardcoded in CountryConstants.cs static methods.', 'implication': 'Countries table is structural/referential data only. It may have been used for dynamic mapping in an earlier architecture. Currently a dead table from an API perspective — consistent with gap_analysis.json finding.'}

{'id': 'I005', 'name': 'CommonController — primary HTTP surface for this domain', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'ServiceAlert.Web/Controllers/Common/CommonController.cs is the main HTTP API surface for the localization domain. It mixes localization endpoints with unrelated concerns (Captcha, logo serving, page sensitivity tracking).', 'endpoints': ['GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson?languageId={id} — AllowAnonymous, called by Angular BiHttpTranslateLoader at bootstrap', 'POST /api/Common/Resources?languageId={id} — SuperAdmin, paginated/filtered search of LanguageResourceModel', 'POST /api/Common/InsertLocalizedResource — SuperAdmin', 'POST /api/Common/UpdateLocalizedResource — SuperAdmin', 'POST /api/Common/DeleteLocalizedResource — SuperAdmin', 'GET /api/Common/DownloadResourcesExcel — SuperAdmin, optional ?languageId filter'], 'note': 'Iteration 1 of this analysis missed CommonController because it only searched ServiceAlert.Api project. CommonController lives in ServiceAlert.Web project. Lesson documented in GAP_001 closure.'}

{'id': 'I006', 'name': 'Angular TranslationManagementService — admin frontend client', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Angular service at translation-management.service.ts backing the super-admin translation management UI. Wraps all 5 admin HTTP endpoints. Uses ApiRoutes.commonRoutes.localizationRoutes static class to reference endpoint paths.', 'known_bug': "GAP_005: updateLocalizedResource tap() hardcodes 'da'/'se' for frontend cache update instead of using getLanguageCodeByLanguageId(). insertLocalizedResources correctly uses getLanguageCodeByLanguageId().", 'frontend_component': 'translation-management.component.ts — lazy PrimeNG table, language filter dropdown (5 languages, no German), resourceName/resourceValue search, displayMode toggle (All / NonTranslated), row-level inline edit/delete/create, Excel download.'}

{'id': 'I007', 'name': 'BiHttpTranslateLoader — Angular translation bootstrap', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Custom ngx-translate TranslateLoader at app-globals/classes/BiHttpTranslateLoader.ts. Called by Angular at app bootstrap for each language. Maps Angular language codes (e.g. 'da', 'sv', 'en', 'fi', 'nb') to BiCountryId values and calls GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson. Result dictionary fed directly into ngx-translate store.", 'language_code_mapping': 'da → 1 (DK), sv → 2 (SE), en → 3 (EN), fi → 4 (FI), nb → 5 (NO). No mapping for language code 6 (DE) — consistent with GAP_004.', 'key_transform': 'BiTranslateService forces all translation key lookups to UPPERCASE. CommonController.GetResourcesJson also UPPER-cases keys before returning. Both sides match.'}

GET /{'id': 'b001', 'name': 'getlocalizedresource', 'type': 'fact', 'description': 'looks up a translation string by resourcename key and languageid. returns the resourcename itself (not empty string) if no match is found — fail-open by design.', 'source': 'localizationservice.getlocalizedresource(resourcekey, languageid)', 'caching': "results cached by key 'sms.lsr.{languageid}-{upper(resourcekey)}'. cache invalidated on any write via removebypattern('sms.lsr.').", 'fallback': 'returns resourcekey as-is when not found. never returns null or empty.', 'used_by': ['statuscontroller (status description translation)', 'messagecontroller (default group name, datetime format)', 'usercontroller (login error message)']}

GET /{'id': 'b002', 'name': 'getlocalizedresourcewithparams', 'type': 'fact', 'description': "like b001 but performs token replacement in the result. tokens are in format '{somekey}'. runs foreach replace on the resolved string.", 'source': 'localizationservice.getlocalizedresource(resourcekey, languageid, translationparams)', 'note': "no escaping of token values — if a value contains a '{anotherkey}' pattern, it would be double-replaced. not observed as a bug in practice."}

GET /{'id': 'b010', 'name': 'getresourcesjson — public translation bootstrap endpoint', 'type': 'fact', 'description': 'returns all localized resources for a given languageid as a flat json object keyed by upper(resourcename). this is the endpoint the angular frontend calls at bootstrap via bihttptranslateloader. allowanonymous — required because it is also used by iframe modules that may not have a bearer token.', 'source': 'commoncontroller.getresourcesjson(int languageid)', 'endpoint': 'get /api/common/getresourcesjson?languageid={id}', 'auth': 'allowanonymous', 'caller': "bihttptranslateloader.gettranslation(lang) — maps angular lang code (e.g. 'da', 'sv') to bicountryid and calls this endpoint", 'processing': 'calls _localizationservice.getall(languageid), builds dictionary<string,string>, returns ok(dict). keys are upper-cased to match bitranslateservice convention.', 'note': 'no caching at http level — caching is done inside localizationservice.getall(). duplicate key guard: only first occurrence added (resourcename uniqueness maintained by db unique index, so duplicates should not occur).'}

POST /{'id': 'b011', 'name': 'resources — paginated admin search', 'type': 'fact', 'description': "returns paginated, filterable list of languageresourcemodel for a given language. supports searching by resourcename substring and resourcevalue substring. supports 'onlyincomplete' flag to show only keys with 'missing translation' value.", 'source': 'commoncontroller.resources(int languageid, languageresourcesquery query)', 'endpoint': 'post /api/common/resources?languageid={id}', 'auth': 'superadmin', 'caller': 'translationmanagementservice.getalllocalizedresources(languageid, query)', 'processing': 'queries all resources for language, applies optional text filters in-memory, paginates via paginate(query) extension method. returns datatableresultmodel<languageresourcemodel> with total and data.'}

POST /{'id': 'b012', 'name': 'insertlocalizedresource — admin create', 'type': 'fact', 'description': "creates a new localestringresource for a specific language. validates no existing resource with same resourcename exists (case-insensitive check). after insert, auto-creates placeholder 'missing translation' rows for all other languages (via localizationservice.insertlocalestringresource invariant b003).", 'source': 'commoncontroller.insertlocalizedresource(string resourcename, string resourcevalue, int languageid)', 'endpoint': 'post /api/common/insertlocalizedresource?resourcename=x&resourcevalue=y&languageid=z', 'auth': 'superadmin', 'caller': 'translationmanagementservice.insertlocalizedresources(resourcename, resourcevalue, languageid)', 'cache_effect': "clears full 'sms.lsr.' cache pattern on insert."}

POST /{'id': 'b013', 'name': 'updatelocalizedresource — admin edit', 'type': 'fact', 'description': 'updates an existing localestringresource by id. validates id != 0, resourcename and resourcevalue not empty, resource exists. updates all three fields (resourcename, resourcevalue, languageid).', 'source': 'commoncontroller.updatelocalizedresource(int id, string resourcename, string resourcevalue, int languageid)', 'endpoint': 'post /api/common/updatelocalizedresource?id=x&resourcename=y&resourcevalue=z&languageid=w', 'auth': 'superadmin', 'caller': 'translationmanagementservice.updatelocalizedresource(id, resourcename, resourcevalue, languageid)', 'cache_effect': "clears full 'sms.lsr.' cache pattern on update.", 'known_bug': "gap_005 — caller's tap() for frontend cache update hardcodes 'da'/'se' instead of using getlanguagecodebylanguageid()"}

POST /{'id': 'b014', 'name': 'deletelocalizedresource — admin delete', 'type': 'fact', 'description': "deletes a localestringresource by id. validates id != 0 and resource exists. note: only deletes the single language row — does not delete all language versions of the same resourcename. this can leave orphan 'missing translation' rows for other languages.", 'source': 'commoncontroller.deletelocalizedresource(int id)', 'endpoint': 'post /api/common/deletelocalizedresource?id={id}', 'auth': 'superadmin', 'caller': 'translationmanagementservice.deletelocalizedresource(id)', 'note': 'ui confirms deletion with dialog before calling this endpoint.'}

PUT /{'id': 'b015', 'name': 'downloadresourcesexcel — export to spreadsheet', 'type': 'fact', 'description': "exports all localestringresources (or optionally a single language) as an excel file. uses formattedexcelreportdownloader<translationrecord>. file name is localized via getlocalizedresource('superadministration.translations.translations').", 'source': 'commoncontroller.downloadresourcesexcel(int? languageid)', 'endpoint': 'get /api/common/downloadresourcesexcel?languageid={optional}', 'auth': 'superadmin', 'output': 'filecontentresult — application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet', 'caller': 'translationmanagementservice.downloadresourcesexcel(languageid)'}

authorization_hints: {'id': 'R004', 'name': 'CountryId = LanguageId equivalence', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'In this system, CountryId and LanguageId hold the same numeric range (1–6) and the same semantic mapping: 1=DK, 2=SE, 3=EN, 4=FI, 5=NO, 6=DE. They are used interchangeably in code.', 'source': 'CountryConstants.cs, identity_access/010_entities.json (User.CountryId note)', 'risk': 'Coupling. Any future divergence (e.g. a 7th country without a corresponding language) would require significant refactoring.'}

{'id': 'B001', 'name': 'GetLocalizedResource', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Looks up a translation string by ResourceName key and LanguageId. Returns the ResourceName itself (not empty string) if no match is found — fail-open by design.', 'source': 'LocalizationService.GetLocalizedResource(resourceKey, languageId)', 'caching': "Results cached by key 'sms.lsr.{languageId}-{UPPER(resourceKey)}'. Cache invalidated on any write via RemoveByPattern('sms.lsr.').", 'fallback': 'Returns resourceKey as-is when not found. Never returns null or empty.', 'used_by': ['StatusController (status description translation)', 'MessageController (default group name, datetime format)', 'UserController (login error message)']}

{'id': 'B002', 'name': 'GetLocalizedResourceWithParams', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Like B001 but performs token replacement in the result. Tokens are in format '{someKey}'. Runs ForEach Replace on the resolved string.", 'source': 'LocalizationService.GetLocalizedResource(resourceKey, languageId, translationParams)', 'note': "No escaping of token values — if a value contains a '{anotherKey}' pattern, it would be double-replaced. Not observed as a bug in practice."}

{'id': 'B010', 'name': 'GetResourcesJson — public translation bootstrap endpoint', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Returns ALL localized resources for a given languageId as a flat JSON object keyed by UPPER(ResourceName). This is the endpoint the Angular frontend calls at bootstrap via BiHttpTranslateLoader. AllowAnonymous — required because it is also used by iFrame modules that may not have a bearer token.', 'source': 'CommonController.GetResourcesJson(int languageId)', 'endpoint': 'GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson?languageId={id}', 'auth': 'AllowAnonymous', 'caller': "BiHttpTranslateLoader.getTranslation(lang) — maps Angular lang code (e.g. 'da', 'sv') to BiCountryId and calls this endpoint", 'processing': 'Calls _localizationService.GetAll(languageId), builds Dictionary<string,string>, returns Ok(dict). Keys are upper-cased to match BiTranslateService convention.', 'note': 'No caching at HTTP level — caching is done inside LocalizationService.GetAll(). Duplicate key guard: only first occurrence added (ResourceName uniqueness maintained by DB unique index, so duplicates should not occur).'}

{'id': 'B011', 'name': 'Resources — paginated admin search', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Returns paginated, filterable list of LanguageResourceModel for a given language. Supports searching by ResourceName substring and ResourceValue substring. Supports 'OnlyIncomplete' flag to show only keys with 'Missing Translation' value.", 'source': 'CommonController.Resources(int languageId, LanguageResourcesQuery query)', 'endpoint': 'POST /api/Common/Resources?languageId={id}', 'auth': 'SuperAdmin', 'caller': 'TranslationManagementService.getAllLocalizedResources(languageId, query)', 'processing': 'Queries all resources for language, applies optional text filters in-memory, paginates via Paginate(query) extension method. Returns DataTableResultModel<LanguageResourceModel> with Total and Data.'}

{'id': 'B012', 'name': 'InsertLocalizedResource — admin create', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Creates a new LocaleStringResource for a specific language. {'name': 'CountryConstants (static)', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Directory/CountryConstants.cs', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['DanishCountryId = 1, SwedishCountryId = 2, EnglishCountryId = 3, FinnishCountryId = 4, NorwegianCountryId = 5, GermanCountryId = 6', 'DanishLanguageId = 1, SwedishLanguageId = 2, EnglishLanguageId = 3, FinnishLanguageId = 4, NorwegianLanguageId = 5, GermanLanguageId = 6', 'Phone codes: DK=45, SE=46, NO=47, FI=358, GB=44, DE=49, NL=31', 'Phone length rules per country (DK/NO=8 digits, SE=9–15, FI=6–12, DE=7–12, GB=8–10)', 'Currency conversion rates: SEK/EUR, SEK/DKK, EUR/DKK, NOK/EUR, NOK/DKK, DKK/EUR'], 'methods': ["GetCultureString(countryId) → 'da-DK' | 'sv-SE' | 'en-GB' | 'fi-FI' | 'nb-NO'", 'GetComparer(countryId) → StringComparer for locale-aware string sorting', "GetCountryCode(countryId) → 'dk' | 'se' | 'gb' | 'fi' | 'no'", "GetISOLanguageCode(countryId) → 'da' | 'sv' | 'en' | 'fi' | 'no'", 'GetPhoneCode(countryId) → phone prefix int', 'GetLanguageName(countryId) → display name string'], 'note': 'CountryId and LanguageId are interchangeable in this system — same numeric value, same 6 entries. This is a known design quirk documented in identity_access domain.'}

{'name': 'LanguageResourceModel (contract)', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Contracts/Models/Common/LanguageResourceModel.cs', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['Id (int — DB row PK)', 'Name (string — maps to ResourceName)', 'Value (string — maps to ResourceValue)', 'LanguageId (int)'], 'note': 'Fully wired. Used by CommonController.Resources (POST /api/Common/Resources, SuperAdmin) and the Angular admin component at translation-management.component.ts. Paired with LanguageResourcesQuery for paginated/filtered searches. GAP_001 (initial analysis error) is now closed — the endpoint and admin UI both exist. Correction: initial grep missed CommonController in ServiceAlert.Web project (not in ServiceAlert.Api).'}

{'name': 'LocaleStringResource', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Localization/LocaleStringResource.cs', 'db_table': 'dbo.LocaleStringResources', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['Id (int, PK, IDENTITY)', 'LanguageId (int, FK → Languages.Id)', "ResourceName (NVARCHAR(200) — dot-separated key, e.g. 'shared.DateFormatShort', 'errorMessages.LoginUsernameOrPassword')", "ResourceValue (NVARCHAR(MAX) — translated string, or 'Missing Translation' sentinel)"], 'indexes': ['ix_LocaleStringResources_ResourceName_LanguageId (ResourceName ASC, LanguageId ASC) INCLUDE(ResourceValue) — read by resource name', 'ix_LocaleStringResources_LanguageId_ResourceName (LanguageId ASC, ResourceName ASC) UNIQUE INCLUDE(ResourceValue) — ensures uniqueness per language'], 'note': "Every ResourceName exists once per language. When a new resource is inserted, the service auto-creates rows for ALL languages, with 'Missing Translation' as placeholder for non-provided languages. Sentinel value 'Missing Translation' is queryable via GetIncomplete()."}

events: {'note': 'No domain events found for the localization domain.', 'evidence': 'grep search across ServiceAlert.Api, ServiceAlert.Services, ServiceAlert.Batch found no event publishing, no event bus references, and no domain event classes related to Language, LocaleStringResource, or Country.', 'assessment': 'Localization is a pure utility/infrastructure domain. Changes to translations do not trigger business events — they are treated as configuration updates. This is consistent with the batch-script export/import tooling pattern (F003) rather than an event-driven flow.'}
rules: if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.

{'id': 'R001', 'name': 'ResourceName completeness invariant', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Every ResourceName MUST exist for every active language. InsertLocaleStringResource enforces this by auto-creating 'Missing Translation' rows for all other languages on insert.", 'enforcement': 'Application-level in LocalizationService.InsertLocaleStringResource(). NOT enforced by DB constraint.', 'risk': 'If rows are inserted directly via SQL or bulk import, this invariant can be violated.'}

{'id': 'R002', 'name': 'Unique index: (LanguageId, ResourceName)', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'UIX_LocaleStringResources_LanguageId_ResourceName enforces that each (language, key) pair is unique at the database level.', 'enforcement': 'Database constraint.', 'implication': 'BulkMerge import uses this as the merge key — safe because the index guarantees no duplicates.'}

{'id': 'R003', 'name': 'Fail-open resource lookup', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'GetLocalizedResource returns the resourceKey itself (not empty string, not null) when the key is not found. This is an intentional design choice — the UI displays the key as a visible indicator of a missing translation.', 'source': "LocalizationService: 'return resourceKey; // return the resourceKey instead of empty string'", 'implication': "Missing translations are discoverable by seeing resource key strings in the UI (e.g. 'shared.DateFormatShort'). Not a runtime error."}

{'id': 'R004', 'name': 'CountryId = LanguageId equivalence', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'In this system, CountryId and LanguageId hold the same numeric range (1–6) and the same semantic mapping: 1=DK, 2=SE, 3=EN, 4=FI, 5=NO, 6=DE. They are used interchangeably in code.', 'source': 'CountryConstants.cs, identity_access/010_entities.json (User.CountryId note)', 'risk': 'Coupling. Any future divergence (e.g. a 7th country without a corresponding language) would require significant refactoring.'}

{'id': 'R005', 'name': 'Language list is static in production', 'type': 'INFERRED', 'description': 'There is no API to add or remove languages. Languages are seeded at DB setup time. The 10-hour cache on GetAllLanguages assumes the list rarely or never changes.', 'evidence': 'LanguageService only exposes GetAllLanguages(). No Insert/Delete. No admin API endpoint found for language management.', 'implication': 'Adding a 7th language requires a DB migration + reseeding LocaleStringResources for all existing keys.'}

{'id': 'R006', 'name': 'Collation: Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Languages table Language.Name and LanguageCulture columns use COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI — case-insensitive, accent-insensitive. LocaleStringResources uses server default collation.', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.DB/Tables/Languages.sql', 'note': "Collation mismatch between Languages and LocaleStringResources was a flagged concern in system_model.json ('Collation on LocaleStringResources.ResourceValue and ResourceName'). ResourceName lookups are done with exact case (ToUpperInvariant in cache key) but the DB column does not enforce case sensitivity."}

domain_flows: {'id': 'F001', 'name': 'Runtime resource lookup', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Any domain that needs a translated string injects ILocalizationService and calls GetLocalizedResource(key, languageId). LanguageId is sourced from the authenticated user's LanguageId property (via IWorkContext.CurrentUser.LanguageId).", 'steps': ["1. Controller/service resolves current user's LanguageId from IWorkContext", '2. Calls ILocalizationService.GetLocalizedResource(resourceKey, languageId)', "3. Service checks IStaticCacheManager for key 'sms.lsr.{languageId}-{UPPER(resourceKey)}'", '4. Cache hit: return cached ResourceValue', '5. Cache miss: query LocaleStringResources WHERE ResourceName = @key AND LanguageId = @id', '6. Found: cache and return ResourceValue', '7. Not found: return resourceKey as-is (no error thrown)'], 'example_callers': ['StatusController: translates SmsGroup status descriptions', 'MessageController: resolves default group name and date format strings', "UserController: resolves login error message in user's language"]}

{'id': 'F002', 'name': 'Add new translation key', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "When a developer adds a new localized string, it is inserted once with the first language's value. The service auto-creates placeholder rows for all remaining languages.", 'steps': ["1. Call ILocalizationService.InsertLocaleStringResource(lsr) with one language's data", '2. Service calls ILanguageService.GetAllLanguages() to get all 6 language rows', '3. For the matching LanguageId: insert with provided ResourceValue', "4. For all other LanguageIds: insert with ResourceValue = 'Missing Translation'", "5. Clear cache pattern 'sms.lsr.'", '6. Result: 6 rows in LocaleStringResources, all sharing same ResourceName'], 'invariant': 'ResourceName is always present for all languages after insert.'}

{'id': 'F003', 'name': 'Translation export/import cycle (developer tooling)', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Developer workflow for updating translations in bulk. Used via batch command tool. Documented in translations.bat.', 'steps': ['1. Run: ServiceAlert.Batch.exe export_translations labels.json', '2. Batch calls ILocalizationService.ExportLocaleStringResourcesAsync(path)', '3. All resources serialized as JSON: [{LanguageId, ResourceName, ResourceValue}]', '4. Developer/translator edits labels.json', '5. Run: ServiceAlert.Batch.exe import_translations labels.json', '6. Batch calls ILocalizationService.ImportLocaleStringResourcesAsync(path)', '7. Deserializes JSON, BulkMerge via Z.Dapper.Plus keyed on (LanguageId, ResourceName)', '8. Existing rows updated, new rows inserted'], 'note': 'This is a manual developer process — no admin UI exists for this operation currently (GAP_001).'}

{'id': 'F004', 'name': 'User language preference resolution', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Determines which LanguageId to use when the user has no explicit preference set.', 'steps': ['1. UserController reads Accept-Language header or URL parameter', '2. Calls private GetRequestLanguage() to resolve Language entity', '3. LanguageService.GetAllLanguages() called (cache hit in most cases)', '4. Matches against published languages', '5. If no match: fall back to default (DanishLanguageId = 1)', '6. User.LanguageId set/saved on profile update'], 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Api/Controllers/UserController.cs: GetRequestLanguage(), GetUserLanguage()'}

{'id': 'F005', 'name': 'Country-to-culture resolution', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Maps a CountryId (which equals LanguageId) to .NET culture strings for locale-aware operations like string sorting and phone validation.', 'steps': ['1. Caller has a CountryId (e.g. from profile, message, or address context)', "2. CountryConstants.GetCultureString(countryId) returns 'da-DK', 'sv-SE', etc.", '3. Used to create CultureInfo for StringComparer (locale-aware sorting)', '4. Used to create CultureInfo for DateTime formatting', '5. Also used to derive phone prefix and country code for SMS routing'], 'note': 'Countries table in DB provides ISO codes, but CountryConstants provides the operational mapping used at runtime — the table is not queried at runtime.'}
known_integrations: {'id': 'I001', 'name': 'ILocalizationService — cross-domain utility', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'LocalizationService is injected as a utility into multiple other domains. It does not own a dedicated API surface — it is a supporting service.', 'consumers': [{'consumer': 'StatusController', 'usage': 'GetLocalizedResource(status.TranslationKey, countryId) — translates SMS delivery status descriptions per country/language'}, {'consumer': 'MessageController', 'usage': "GetLocalizedResource('messages.defaultGroupName', languageId) and GetLocalizedResource('shared.DateTimeFormat', languageId) — localizes default message group name and datetime format"}, {'consumer': 'UserController', 'usage': "GetLocalizedResource('errorMessages.LoginUsernameOrPassword', languageId) — translates login error message; also uses GetLanguageLookup indirectly"}], 'note': 'ILocalizationService is registered as Scoped in Startup.cs (line 515). ILanguageService registered as Scoped (line 512).'}

{'id': 'I002', 'name': 'IStaticCacheManager — in-memory caching', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'LocalizationService and LanguageService both use IStaticCacheManager for aggressive in-memory caching. Language list cached 10 hours. Individual resource lookups cached indefinitely until pattern-cleared.', 'cache_keys': ["'ServiceAlert.language.all' — all Language rows, 10-hour TTL", "'sms.lsr.{languageId}-{UPPER(resourceKey)}' — individual resource lookups, cleared on write"], 'invalidation': "InsertLocaleStringResource, UpdateLocaleStringResource, DeleteLocaleStringResource all call RemoveByPattern('sms.lsr.'). Batch import does NOT invalidate cache."}

{'id': 'I003', 'name': 'Z.Dapper.Plus — bulk merge for import', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Import operation uses Z.Dapper.Plus BulkMerge with entity configuration: Table='dbo.LocaleStringResources', Key=(LanguageId, ResourceName). This matches the unique index.", 'source': 'LocalizationService.ImportLocaleStringResourcesAsync: DapperPlusManager.Entity<LocaleStringResource>().Table(...).Key(x => new { x.LanguageId, x.ResourceName })'}

{'id': 'I004', 'name': 'Countries table — runtime not queried', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'The Countries table exists in SSDT schema and is referenced conceptually by CountryConstants, but is NOT queried at runtime. All country-to-culture, country-to-phone-code, and country-to-language mappings are hardcoded in CountryConstants.cs static methods.', 'implication': 'Countries table is structural/referential data only. It may have been used for dynamic mapping in an earlier architecture. Currently a dead table from an API perspective — consistent with gap_analysis.json finding.'}

{'id': 'I005', 'name': 'CommonController — primary HTTP surface for this domain', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'ServiceAlert.Web/Controllers/Common/CommonController.cs is the main HTTP API surface for the localization domain. It mixes localization endpoints with unrelated concerns (Captcha, logo serving, page sensitivity tracking).', 'endpoints': ['GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson?languageId={id} — AllowAnonymous, called by Angular BiHttpTranslateLoader at bootstrap', 'POST /api/Common/Resources?languageId={id} — SuperAdmin, paginated/filtered search of LanguageResourceModel', 'POST /api/Common/InsertLocalizedResource — SuperAdmin', 'POST /api/Common/UpdateLocalizedResource — SuperAdmin', 'POST /api/Common/DeleteLocalizedResource — SuperAdmin', 'GET /api/Common/DownloadResourcesExcel — SuperAdmin, optional ?languageId filter'], 'note': 'Iteration 1 of this analysis missed CommonController because it only searched ServiceAlert.Api project. CommonController lives in ServiceAlert.Web project. Lesson documented in GAP_001 closure.'}

{'id': 'I006', 'name': 'Angular TranslationManagementService — admin frontend client', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'Angular service at translation-management.service.ts backing the super-admin translation management UI. Wraps all 5 admin HTTP endpoints. Uses ApiRoutes.commonRoutes.localizationRoutes static class to reference endpoint paths.', 'known_bug': "GAP_005: updateLocalizedResource tap() hardcodes 'da'/'se' for frontend cache update instead of using getLanguageCodeByLanguageId(). insertLocalizedResources correctly uses getLanguageCodeByLanguageId().", 'frontend_component': 'translation-management.component.ts — lazy PrimeNG table, language filter dropdown (5 languages, no German), resourceName/resourceValue search, displayMode toggle (All / NonTranslated), row-level inline edit/delete/create, Excel download.'}

{'id': 'I007', 'name': 'BiHttpTranslateLoader — Angular translation bootstrap', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Custom ngx-translate TranslateLoader at app-globals/classes/BiHttpTranslateLoader.ts. Called by Angular at app bootstrap for each language. Maps Angular language codes (e.g. 'da', 'sv', 'en', 'fi', 'nb') to BiCountryId values and calls GET /api/Common/GetResourcesJson. Result dictionary fed directly into ngx-translate store.", 'language_code_mapping': 'da → 1 (DK), sv → 2 (SE), en → 3 (EN), fi → 4 (FI), nb → 5 (NO). No mapping for language code 6 (DE) — consistent with GAP_004.', 'key_transform': 'BiTranslateService forces all translation key lookups to UPPERCASE. CommonController.GetResourcesJson also UPPER-cases keys before returning. Both sides match.'}
validation_rules: if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.

{'id': 'R001', 'name': 'ResourceName completeness invariant', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': "Every ResourceName MUST exist for every active language. InsertLocaleStringResource enforces this by auto-creating 'Missing Translation' rows for all other languages on insert.", 'enforcement': 'Application-level in LocalizationService.InsertLocaleStringResource(). NOT enforced by DB constraint.', 'risk': 'If rows are inserted directly via SQL or bulk import, this invariant can be violated.'}

{'id': 'R002', 'name': 'Unique index: (LanguageId, ResourceName)', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'UIX_LocaleStringResources_LanguageId_ResourceName enforces that each (language, key) pair is unique at the database level.', 'enforcement': 'Database constraint.', 'implication': 'BulkMerge import uses this as the merge key — safe because the index guarantees no duplicates.'}

{'id': 'R003', 'name': 'Fail-open resource lookup', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'GetLocalizedResource returns the resourceKey itself (not empty string, not null) when the key is not found. This is an intentional design choice — the UI displays the key as a visible indicator of a missing translation.', 'source': "LocalizationService: 'return resourceKey; // return the resourceKey instead of empty string'", 'implication': "Missing translations are discoverable by seeing resource key strings in the UI (e.g. 'shared.DateFormatShort'). Not a runtime error."}

{'id': 'R004', 'name': 'CountryId = LanguageId equivalence', 'type': 'FACT', 'description': 'In this system, CountryId and LanguageId hold the same numeric range (1–6) and the same semantic mapping: 1=DK, 2=SE, 3=EN, 4=FI, 5=NO, 6=DE. They are used interchangeably in code.', 'source': 'CountryConstants.cs, identity_access/010_entities.json (User.CountryId note)', 'risk': 'Coupling. Any future divergence (e.g. a 7th country without a corresponding language) would require significant refactoring.'}
